VAL-RUNBOOK-011.reason: Scoring deterministically rejects None/NaN/Inf/negative inputs producing None (not NaN). ScoreStatus explicitly tracks VALID/PARTIAL/ERROR. test_score_never_nan proves the core invariant. Verified across 33 passing tests.

summary: Tested 11 assertions (VAL-RUNBOOK-001 through VAL-RUNBOOK-011): all 11 passed. Full test suite: 387/387 tests passed (0 failures). All runbook assertions are covered by dedicated test files with fixture-based mocking of GPU tools. Implementation in src/ornn_bench/runbook/, runner.py, and scoring.py matches specification requirements.
